pep_all20.notes: 20 standard AAs once each — every property defined. Reference for full-coverage numerics.

pep_polya_10.notes: Closed-form: every dipeptide is AA → II = (10/10)*9*1.0 = 9.0; aliphatic = 100.0; gravy = 1.8.

pep_short.notes: 4 aa < 10 — instability NA per R9; everything else defined.

pep_polybasic_150.notes: 150 R's — with peptide pKa_R=11.84 the polybasic side chains exceed C-terminus contribution at pH 14 (need ≥ ~145 R's), so charge stays positive and pI is NA per spec NA guard.

pep_polyacidic_30.notes: 30 D's — N-term contribution at pH 0 still gives a zero crossing; pI defined and low.

pep_aromatic.notes: FFWWYY: aromaticity = 1.0; ε_red = 2*5500 + 2*1490 = 13980 (no Cys → ε_ox = ε_red).

pep_no_aromatic.notes: No Y or W — ε emits 0 (NOT NA) per spec; aromaticity = 0.

pep_with_stop.notes: Stop codon * → all properties NA per spec edge-case table.

pep_with_x.notes: X/B/Z dropped — cleaned to 'ACE' (3 aa); instability NA, others defined.

ab_full_paired.notes: Full 7 regions both chains, IG → CDR3 + full-chain + Fv all defined.

ab_h_only.notes: Chain A full, chain B all empty → A defined, B + Fv all NA.

ab_h_full_l_cdr3.notes: Chain A full, chain B only CDR3 → CDR3s defined for both; B full NA; Fv NA.

ab_cdr3_only.notes: Only CDR3 columns populated — CDR3 properties defined; full-chain + Fv NA.

ab_partial_a.notes: Chain A missing FR1 + FR4 — CDR3 still computed; A full-chain NA; B full + Fv? Fv requires both → NA.

ab_stop_in_cdr3.notes: Stop codon in A_CDR3 → A CDR3 + reconstructed A full-chain both NA (* invalidates whole sequence). B unaffected; Fv NA.

tcr.notes: Same input rows as antibody, but plan switched to TCRAB. Fv columns must be ABSENT from the schema (R12: Fv only for IG).

ab_full_paired.notes: TCR with both chains full — per-chain columns defined; Fv columns absent from schema.
